name: Bit-Cremental: Fishistry
short_description: Grow fish with a gachapon twist in this bite-sized idler! Feed, nurture, and watch as fisher people reel in mature catches, earning money to upgrade things like feeding, growth, and fishing speeds for even faster profits.
detailed_description:
Dive into the delightful world of fish farming and fishing in this short experimental idler, Bit-cremental: Fishistry!

Grow and feed your stock, earn money as fisher people reel in mature fish, and upgrade to unlock rare species and colorful new designs, all set in a charming Game Boy-inspired style.

Gameplay Features:

  • Fish Growth: Grow your fish and aquatic creatures from tiny eggs to fully grown wonders.

  • Fish Discovery System: Encounter 24 different fish types based on rarity, and strive to discover them all!

  • Idle and Active Gameplay: Play actively or let your fishery grow while you’re away with automatic idle progression.

  • Game Boy Inspired Graphics and Sounds: Play a piece of nostalgia with a retro inspired pixel art from the 90's handheld era with a crunchy audio track.

  • Customize: Add a personal touch to your fishery with unlockable backgrounds and color palettes.

  • Upgradeable Fishery: Improve your fishery with upgrades like better feed, fish value, and fish capacity.

  • Simple & Relaxing Play: A short, laid-back gameplay experience perfect for casual gaming with incremental progression.
